title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
